ddls:
CREATE TABLE "experiments" (
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each experiment */,
  "camera" TEXT /* Type of camera used for recording */,
  "trial_number" INTEGER /* Number of the trial */,
  "water_type" TEXT /* Type of water used in the experiment */,
  "water_time" INTEGER /* Time water was added to the tank */,
  "arena" INTEGER /* Arena number in the experiment */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the experiment */,
  "day" TEXT /* Day of the week the experiment was conducted */,
  "origin" TEXT /* Origin or location of the experiment */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the experiment */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the experiment */,
  "duration" TEXT /* Duration of the experiment */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the experiment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("experiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiments_water_type FOREIGN KEY ("water_type") REFERENCES water_types ("water_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiments_arena FOREIGN KEY ("arena") REFERENCES arenas ("arena_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fish" (
  "fish_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each fish */,
  "mark" TEXT /* Marking or identifier of the fish */,
  "sex" TEXT /* Sex of the fish */,
  "group" TEXT /* Group of the fish (e.g., Within Control) */,
  "tank" TEXT /* Type of tank used */,
  "species" TEXT /* Species of the fish */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the fish */,
  "length" REAL /* Length of the fish */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the fish */,
  "feeding_pattern" TEXT /* Feeding pattern of the fish */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("fish_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fish_tank FOREIGN KEY ("tank") REFERENCES tanks ("tank_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "behavioral_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each set of behavioral metrics */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the experiment */,
  "fish_id" TEXT /* Reference to the fish */,
  "total_distance" REAL /* Total distance traveled by the fish */,
  "mean_velocity" REAL /* Mean velocity of the fish */,
  "high_duration" REAL /* Duration spent in high-activity zones */,
  "mid_duration" REAL /* Duration spent in mid-activity zones */,
  "low_duration" REAL /* Duration spent in low-activity zones */,
  "freezing_duration" REAL /* Duration spent in freezing zones */,
  "arena_duration" REAL /* Duration spent in the arena */,
  "latency_high" REAL /* Latency to enter high-activity zones */,
  "frequency_high" INTEGER /* Frequency of high-activity events */,
  "activity_zones" TEXT /* Detailed breakdown of the activity zones */,
  "swimming_direction" TEXT /* Swimming direction of the fish */,
  "swimming_speed" REAL /* Swimming speed of the fish */,
  "feeding_frequency" REAL /* Frequency of feeding */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_behavioral_metrics_fish_id FOREIGN KEY ("fish_id") REFERENCES fish ("fish_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_behavioral_metrics_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tanks" (
  "tank_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each tank */,
  "tank_type" TEXT /* Type of the tank (e.g., Tall, Short) */,
  "capacity" REAL /* Capacity of the tank in liters */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the tank */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the tank */,
  "water_quality" TEXT /* Quality of the water in the tank */,
  "tank_size" TEXT /* Size of the tank */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tank_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "arenas" (
  "arena_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each arena */,
  "arena_number" INTEGER /* Arena number in the experiment */,
  "dimensions" TEXT /* Dimensions of the arena */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the arena */,
  "arena_shape" TEXT /* Shape of the arena */,
  "arena_size" TEXT /* Size of the arena */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("arena_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "water_types" (
  "water_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each type of water */,
  "water_type" TEXT /* Type of water (e.g., water1, water2) */,
  "quality" TEXT /* Quality of the water */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the water */,
  "water_temperature" REAL /* Temperature of the water */,
  "water_ph" REAL /* pH level of the water */,
  "water_humidity" REAL /* Humidity level of the water */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("water_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "institution" TEXT /* Institution the user belongs to */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the experiment */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the experiment was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "data_downloaded" INTEGER /* Flag indicating whether data was downloaded */,
  "data_viewed" INTEGER /* Flag indicating whether data was viewed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
